INSERT INTO st_technician (snapshot_time, raw_json)
VALUES (NOW(), {{ getTechnicianReport.data }})

INSERT INTO st_installer (snapshot_time, raw_json)
VALUES (NOW(), {{ getInstallerReport.data }})

VALUES (NOW(), {{ getPerformanceCSR.data }})

INSERT INTO st_per_summary (snapshot_time, raw_json)
VALUES (NOW(), {{ getPerformanceSummary.data }})

INSERT INTO st_lead (snapshot_time, raw_json)
VALUES (NOW(), {{ getLead.data }})

INSERT INTO st_campaign (snapshot_time, raw_json)
VALUES (NOW(), {{ getCampaign.data }})

INSERT INTO st_trending (snapshot_time, raw_json)
VALUES (NOW(), {{ getTrending.data }})

VALUES (NOW(), {{ getSales.data }})

INSERT INTO st_sales_monthly_pace (snapshot_time, raw_json)
VALUES (NOW(), {{ getSalesMonthlyPace.data }})
